chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1477 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 5751/2025 For hearing of main case 29.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Heman Das S. Sanghani, Advocate for Respondent No.11 M/s Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh and Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG along with Inspector Ghulam Qadir SHO PS Kadhan and ASI Allah Bachayo Khaskheli IO of Crime No.382/2025 PS Badin ----- Respondent No.5 SHO PS Kadhan, District Badin, files statement, same is taken on record. Para-4 of said statement is as follows: “That, necessary directions have been received from SSP Badin to act in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioner and his family, if he approaches.” Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied with the above statement and seeks disposal of the Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
